tool.name: Flowise
tool.description: Low-code orchestration and agent workflow builder now under Workday ownership.
tool.logoNotes: Official Flowise docs-site icon asset (`Flowise Logo Dark High Res`) served from the owner-controlled documentation site. GitBook currently delivers the resized file as JPEG.
tool.practitionerNote: Practical low-code orchestration layer for teams moving quickly, provided they validate security posture and ownership-roadmap fit for production use.

dataResidency.detail: Self-hosted is customer-controlled; Flowise Cloud stores data in US East 1 only.

deployment.detail: Self-hosted (Apache-2.0 core) or Flowise Cloud SaaS.

auditLogging.detail: No dedicated audit-log documentation; enterprise tier may add capabilities.

soc2.detail: No SOC 2 certification announced by Flowise directly.

iso27001.detail: No ISO 27001 certification found in Flowise documentation.

euAiAct.detail: Low-code agent/workflow builder tooling, not an AI model/provider.

licenseRisk.detail: Apache-2.0 core + proprietary Commercial License for packages/server/src/enterprise (SSO/RBAC/audit).
